description_long: This is a small, single-engine, fixed-wing airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a low-wing configuration. The exterior is primarily white with a red underbelly and accents, and it features a two-seat enclosed cockpit with large side windows for visibility. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the tail section includes a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The landing gear is tricycle-type, with two main wheels under the wings and a nose wheel. The airplane's design suggests it is suitable for general aviation, training, or private use. The overall appearance is sleek and functional, with smooth surfaces and minimal external protrusions.
description: A small, low-wing, single-propeller airplane with a white and red color scheme and an enclosed two-seat cockpit. It features tricycle landing gear and a conventional tail design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red underbelly, white upper fuselage, and the cockpit windows, with the propeller and tail clearly visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the nose-mounted propeller, symmetrical wings, and the tricycle landing gear arrangement.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the cockpit, propeller, and tail, with the registration marking visible on the tail.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the tail assembly, horizontal stabilizers, and the main landing gear under the wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with straight wings and no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a single nose wheel, fixed configuration.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with side-by-side seating and large side windows.
